brand.name: GUIDO CAFFÈ | Coffee shop inspired by the Italian Culture
brand.vibeSummary:
𝙉𝙊𝙏 𝙏𝙊𝙊 𝘽𝘼𝘿 🇮🇹
A Lausanne neighborhood coffee shop
inspired by the Italian Culture.

story.heading: La Dolce Vita in the Heart of Lausanne
paragraphs: Guido Caffè was born out of a simple passion: to bring the authentic, slow-roasted coffee culture of Italy to the heart of Lausanne. Every single morning, our espresso machine comes alive to extract the richest crema, setting the rhythm for our community.

Our kitchen operates on the philosophy of simplicity and quality. We source clean, seasonal ingredients to assemble our signature paninis and bake classic Italian dolci daily. At Guido, you are not just a customer; you are part of our extended family.

items.name: Sfogliatella
items.description: Classic shell-shaped Neapolitan pastry with crisp, flaky layers of laminated dough, filled with sweet ricotta and candied orange peel.

items.name: Bombolone Pistacchio
items.description: Sugar-dusted Italian donut filled with a luscious, velvety cream made from authentic Bronte green pistachios.

items.name: Tiramisu Spéculos
items.description: An artisanal twist on the classic Italian dessert with layers of speculoos biscuits, premium espresso soak, and light mascarpone cream.

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.description: Freshly pulled wood-fired espresso layered with velvety steamed milk and a signature crosshatch drizzle of sweet caramel.

items.name: Mocchaccino
items.description: A rich fusion of our dark chocolate cocoa base and double-shot espresso, topped with silky microfoam and a dusting of pure cocoa.

items.name: Caffè Al Ginseng
items.description: An energizing, traditional Italian favorite featuring rich espresso infused with aromatic ginseng root extract for a sweet, earthy finish.

items.name: Americano
items.description: Double shot of our Napoli slow-roasted signature espresso, diluted with hot water to preserve the smooth crema and intense body.

items.name: Thé Chaud Bio
items.description: A curated selection of premium organic herbal and black teas, served in an artisanal infusion pot for the ultimate relaxing brew.

T’es fan de pistache ? On a pensé à toi chez Guido Caffè. 💚 Cornetto fourré, bombolone bien rempli, et maintenant… on a même un matcha latte version pistache.

Trois raisons de passer chez Guido. Et de revenir.

📍 Av. du Chablais 53, Lausanne

🚨 Nous recrutons ! 🚨

Pour renforcer notre équipe pendant le rush de midi, Guido Caffè recherche une personne motivée pour assister la barista sur notre service cafétéria & focacceria.

📍 Lieu : Avenue du Chablais 53, 1007 Lausanne
📩 Intéressé(e) ? Envoie-nous ton dossier par e-mail: ciao@guidocaffe.com

Il y a les pressés qui prennent leur café au comptoir. Ceux qui s’installent sur notre terrasse au soleil avec un matcha ou un iced latte. Et il y a ceux qui passent en coup de vent pour une commande à emporter.

Tu fais peut-être un peu tout ça à la fois. Alors on a pensé à toi : au Guido, après 10 boissons, la suivante est pour nous.

📍 GUIDO CAFFÈ, Av. du Chablais 53, Lausanne
🚇 m1 : Malley
